_publications._publicationTitle: Generation of a zebrafish neurofibromatosis model via inducible knockout of nf2a/b.

_contextSnippet: We performed PCR sequencing for the nf2a and nf2b target regions and observed CRISPR-Cas9-induced modifications in 70-95% of the reads
details: CRISPR-Cas9-induced modifications observed in 70-95% of sequencing reads for nf2a and nf2b target regions
